title: Rad Storm
description: The sky bruises green and a screaming wind drives glowing dust toward you. There is no outrunning it — only a choice of how to weather the surge.

options.text: Hunker down and ride it out (lose 4 HP)
options.result: You wrap up tight and breathe through your scarf. The storm flays your skin raw but passes you by.

options.text: [Charm 5] Wave down a passing convoy for shelter
options.result: Your frantic charm earns a wave back. They haul you into a sealed truck, patch you up, and slip you some coin for the road.

options.text: [Luck] Sprint through the glow toward a bunker
options.result_success: You thread the worst of it and slam the bunker hatch. Inside, an intact core hums in the dark — and you feel charmed.
options.result_fail: The storm catches you in the open. You reach the bunker scorched and retching, the dose still burning in your lungs.
